name: file-upload
description: A drag-and-drop dropzone that uploads each file on its own and survives partial failure: per-file progress bars and a Retry button on the files that fail, instead of sinking the whole batch.

notes: The dropzone is a keyboard-operable button — Enter / Space open the file picker
Each file exposes a role=progressbar with aria-valuenow
Upload success and failure are announced via a polite live region
Each file row carries a labelled Remove (and, on failure, Retry) control
A failed upload shows an inline alert, scoped to that file

intents: a drag-and-drop file upload with progress and retry
upload files with a progress bar and per-file error handling
an attachment dropzone that retries failed files
